name: codex-claude-executor
description: Let Codex plan, delegate to Claude Code, and autonomously verify and repair implementation work.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plans and verifies, Claude Code executes
interface.longDescription: Codex plans and verifies implementation work while a persistent Claude Code worker edits files, runs code checks, survives MCP restarts, and retries stalled executions. Codex automatically delegates focused repairs when verification fails.
defaultPrompt: Plan this task, delegate implementation and code checks to Claude Code, then independently verify the result.
Use the persistent Claude worker and automatically delegate focused repairs until verification passes.
Keep previews and browser checks in Codex while Claude performs all code edits and code-level checks.
